top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';

SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';

WITH euro_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
)
SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN euro_customers ec ON t.CustomerID = ec.CustomerID;

SELECT AVG(total_price) AS average_total_price
FROM (
    SELECT t.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro'
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID
) AS customer_totals;

SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';

WITH euro_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
)
SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN euro_customers ec ON t.CustomerID = ec.CustomerID;

SELECT AVG(total_price) AS average_total_price
FROM (
    SELECT t.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro'
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID
) AS customer_totals;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(t.Amount * t.Price) AS average_total_price
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';
